reason: Check RuntimeSession remains terminal evidence owner only, while AgentRun/control-plane owns convergence outbox and user-visible terminal facts.
Check terminal convergence side effects are owned by cloud backend AgentRun/control-plane modules, not runtime trace infrastructure.
Check mailbox remains durable wake/continuation owner and wait facts stay with LifecycleGate or typed wait records.
Check producer terminal convergence follows WaitProducerRef and gate owner semantics without companion-specific generic ownership.
Check new projection invalidation event remains a typed observable event and not a second business fact source.
Check frontend consumes generated contracts and does not duplicate backend event/status unions as runtime allowlists.
Check frontend command availability, waiting state, and running status still come from AgentRun workspace snapshot.
